references.summary: Application Custom Control Style and application color pattern used as the default design-system style for generated Yeeflow applications.
references.whenToUse: Use for every newly generated Yeeflow application unless the user explicitly requests a different control style or brand color palette.
references.whenNotToUse: Do not use as a tenant-global style reference, a system style pointer, or an approval-specific/page-specific component template.
references.generationProof: Decoded Themes[] contains a Type 1 style theme with stringified Config and a Type 0 application style theme whose Ext.controlDefaultId points to that style theme. The Type 0 Config is a stringified JSON object containing primary, secondary, neutral, and typography settings. Fresh packages must clone the Type 1 theme with a new package-local UUID and must not reuse the exported template UUID.
references.proofBoundary: Export-backed package-shape reference for application-level control style registration and default style binding. This reference does not assert live Designer/runtime rendering without a separate runtime proof.
